welcomeTxt: Recitations of the Holy Quran from around the Islamic world
about_1: A Quranic website that provides the service of listening to the recitations of various Qaris and downloading their audio clips.
about_2: The website aims to facilitate users' access to Quranic recitations easily and conveniently.
about_3: The site features a simple and user-friendly interface that allows users to search for their favorite reciters and listen to their recitations.
about_4: The website allows users to download audio clips for reciters to listen to later without the need for an internet connection.
about_5: The site is considered a valuable resource for those interested in the Quran.
contactDescription: If there is any technical issue or you need to send your feedback or any other details
nameOfRecitation: Ishaq al-Waraq and Idris al-Haddad from behind Al-Bazr
